focus: Keep API keys (ANTHROPIC_API_KEY/OPENAI_API_KEY/ADMIN_TOKEN) out of logs and the repo
Async correctness: FastAPI + aiosqlite — no blocking calls in the event loop
Audio/stream pipeline stays alive — guard against generator stalls; clean up temp/cache dirs
ADMIN_TOKEN gates admin endpoints — never expose without auth
Scriptwriter prompt/transition logic — fallbacks when an LLM or audio source fails
ignore: Do not flag formatting issues — CI/linters catch those

descriptionMust: What changed: which modules or areas
Why: the bug, feature, or behavior this addresses
rules: Keep it concise — no boilerplate sections if they'd be empty
Keep it short and descriptive — max 4 words after prefix

general.description: Python/FastAPI AI radio-station engine that scripts, voices, and streams a continuous AI-hosted radio show; music comes from local files and yt-dlp downloads, with optional Home Assistant integration.
rules: Solo developer — no team process overhead needed

outputFormatting.structure: Always use markdown: headers (##/###), bullets, bold for key terms, tables for comparisons
outputFormatting.tldr: Lead every response with a single TL;DR line before any detail
outputFormatting.decisions: For multi-option decisions: Option A / B / C with explicit tradeoffs in a table or bullet list — never buried in prose
outputFormatting.density: Max 3 sentences per paragraph. Break up walls of text. Prefer visual hierarchy over long paragraphs.
outputFormatting.codeBlocks: Always fence code with a language hint (```rust, ```toml, ```bash). Never inline code longer than one expression.
outputFormatting.citations: When referencing files, use relative paths as inline code (`src/foo.rs`). When referencing external docs, link them.
